basic_details.job_title: TMC Conference Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Conference Assistant Notification 2026 has been released under Advt. No. TMC/AD/100/2026 on the official website of TMC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TMC Conference Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any field with Ms-CIT, proficiency in MS-Excel and Email Communication. 1 Year Experience in conference Coordination/ Event Coordination is Mandatory
qualification.details: Graduate in any field with Ms-CIT, proficiency in MS-Excel and Email Communication. 1 Year Experience in conference Coordination/ Event Coordination is Mandatory.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TMC Conference Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TMC Conference Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download TMC Conference Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC Conference Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TMC Conference Assistant position is 30th June 2026. Ensure you complete all formalities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Conference Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in any field and possess Ms-CIT certification. Proficiency in MS-Excel and email communication is also essential for this role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Conference Assistant position?
faq.answer: Yes, a mandatory one year of experience in conference coordination or event coordination is required for all applicants applying for the Conference Assistant role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Conference Assistant position is 50 years. There are no specific age relaxations mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Conference Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Conference Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the TMC Conference Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the TMC Conference Assistant recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Conference Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Conference Assistant role at TMC involves two stages: an initial screening of applications followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the TMC Conference Assistant job?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of Tata Memorial Centre or via the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Conference Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Conference Assistant in the Tata Memorial Centre recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job for the Conference Assistant position at Tata Memorial Centre is on a contractual basis.
